summary: Decent audience recording of a rare‑song heavy 1993 show, with mixed performance quality but an overall satisfying setlist.
review: The reviewer, who attended the concert, appreciated the song list and the presence of rarer tunes, though they felt some of the versions fell short. No comments were made about the audio fidelity, suggesting a typical ambient Schoeps capture. Overall sentiment is cautiously positive, tempered by the noted performance inconsistencies.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; reviewer rates it 4 stars and praises the setlist but mentions uneven song versions. No recording‑quality feedback, so rating reflects a decent show with uncertain audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific remarks about clarity or mix; likely a standard ambient Schoeps capture without notable issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The setlist was well‑received for its rare selections, though some individual song performances were described as not great.
